taxonomy: Tubella robledorum is a species of fungus, specifically a type of jelly fungus belonging to the genus Tubella. It is classified within the phylum Ascomycota. This species was described in 2015 and is found in Spain. Tubella robledorum is classified as a type of cup fungus, characterized by its distinctive cup-shaped appearance and gelatinous texture. Further research may be necessary to determine its full taxonomic classification.
